item.title: [anaconda error]anaconda bytes object has no attribute get
item.author: æ»‘ç¿”é—ª
item.description: When running anaconda, the startup interface suddenly cannot be opened, but jupyter and notebook can be opened and run directly. The error message is shown in the figure below. I canâ€™t quite understand this None of the commonly used solutions on the Internet work, but here are some: Upgrade installation packageï¼Œ 1 2 3 4 5 conda update navigator conda update anaconda-navigator conda update conda conda update --all Delete Files Delete the .
